metadata.title: Rigid Body Dynamics — AI operations for Indian FMCG manufacturers
metadata.description: AI agents that handle order processing, procurement, production scheduling, and distribution for mid-size Indian FMCG companies. No migration. No new tools. We work with your WhatsApp, Excel, and phone calls.

sections.title: Your team runs your supply chain on WhatsApp and Excel. Our agents handle the rest.
sections.description: We read your WhatsApp messages, parse your Excel sheets, listen to your phone calls — and run your operations automatically. Order processing, procurement, production, distribution, and credit — handled, not tracked.

sections.title: We plug into what you already do. No new tools. No migration.
sections.description: Your team keeps using WhatsApp, Excel, and phone calls. Our agents read everything, understand it, and act on it — automatically.

steps.title: Your salesperson WhatsApps an order from the field
steps.description: "Bhai, Sharma Store ko 50 carton Maggi aur 20 carton Surf bhejdo" — mixed Hindi-English, shorthand, typos and all. Our agent reads it instantly.

steps.title: The agent parses, matches SKUs, and creates the order
steps.description: Product matched. Inventory checked. Order created in your system. Confirmation sent back on WhatsApp. No human re-typed anything.

steps.title: Demand pattern detected — procurement auto-triggered
steps.description: The agent notices SKU-228 orders are up 18% in Maharashtra this week. It auto-generates a purchase order to your sugar vendor before you run out.

steps.title: Production schedule adjusted, dispatch planned
steps.description: Line allocation shifts to meet the spike. Truck loads rebalanced. Warehouse team gets a WhatsApp with updated dispatch plan. Your ops head just watches.

sections.footnote: This entire chain runs without anyone opening a dashboard, filling a form, or making a phone call. The system acts — and tells you what it did.

sections.title: Watch your operations run themselves.
sections.description: Everything below comes from WhatsApp messages, Excel sheets, and phone calls your team already sends. No new data entry. No new tools to learn.

panels.title: Demand vs Forecast
panels.subtitle: SKU-228 · Maharashtra · last 14 days
panels.annotation: +18% vs forecast → RM PO auto-triggered to vendor

panels.title: Disruption radar
items: Sugar — Vendor #4 delayed 36h → auto-routed to Vendor #2
SKU-228 demand +18% in MH → procurement triggered
Distributor D-087 over credit limit → orders on hold

panels.title: Inventory cover
panels.subtitle: days of cover · by SKU group × depot

sections.title: The problems you live with daily — solved.

capabilities.label: No More 9 PM Phone Calls
capabilities.title: See your entire supply chain without calling anyone
capabilities.description: Procurement, production, warehouse, distribution, retail — all live, one screen. Built from data your team already sends on WhatsApp and Excel. No one needs to report anything manually.
highlights: Every node live — procurement to retail
Data comes from WhatsApp, Excel, phone — no new entry
One screen replaces 15 Excel sheets and 40 WhatsApp groups

capabilities.label: Problems Fixed Before You Know
capabilities.title: The system acts on disruptions — not just alerts you
capabilities.description: Vendor delayed? Auto-routed to backup. Demand spike? Procurement triggered. Distributor over credit limit? Orders held. You get a summary, not a fire to fight.
highlights: 87% of disruptions resolved without human action

capabilities.label: 10 Admin Staff → 3 Supervisors
capabilities.title: Agents handle the data entry. Your team handles strategy.
capabilities.description: Order processing, procurement scheduling, production planning, dispatch coordination — all handled by AI agents that read WhatsApp, parse Excel, and act 24/7. Your back-office team supervises instead of re-typing.
highlights: WhatsApp orders processed end-to-end, no human re-typing
Procurement POs generated automatically from demand signals

capabilities.label: Demand From the Field — Today
capabilities.title: Know what's selling at kirana stores before your distributor does
capabilities.description: Every WhatsApp order from a salesperson is a demand signal. We capture it, aggregate it, and push it into your procurement and production — in real time. No ERP gives you this.
highlights: Retail-edge demand via WhatsApp — seconds, not weeks
Salesperson sends order → system detects demand pattern
Forecast improves with every message that flows through

capabilities.label: No More Chasing Payments
capabilities.title: Credit limits enforced automatically — before bad debt happens
capabilities.description: Outstanding tracked across every distributor. Limits enforced on new orders. Risky behavior flagged before your accounts team even opens Tally.
highlights: New orders blocked when limit breached

capabilities.label: Grow Without Hiring
capabilities.title: Add SKUs, states, and distributors — without new back-office hires
capabilities.description: Go from ₹500 Cr to ₹2,000 Cr revenue without proportional headcount. Your operations become the competitive advantage, not the bottleneck.
highlights: New SKUs onboard in days, not quarters
New states added without coordination cost

sections.title: Six agents. One ops team that never sleeps.
sections.description: Each agent owns a piece of your supply chain. They coordinate with each other the way your best ops people would — only faster, around the clock, and they never forget.

cards.name: Procurement Agent
cards.description: Detects when you're running low, picks the best vendor, and places the order — before your warehouse calls to complain.

cards.name: Production Planner
cards.description: Shifts your line schedules when demand changes — so you're making what's selling, not what sold last month.

cards.name: Dispatch Coordinator
cards.description: Fills trucks, assigns routes, and WhatsApps your warehouse team the loading plan. No phone calls needed.

cards.name: Field Listener
cards.description: Reads every WhatsApp message, voice note, and photo from your sales team — and turns it into structured data you can act on.

cards.name: Credit Watchdog
cards.description: Catches distributors going over limit and holds their next order — before your accounts team even knows there's a problem.

cards.name: Forecast Engine
cards.description: Learns demand patterns from every WhatsApp order — and tells procurement and production what's coming next week.

sections.title: We don't just show you data. We act on it.

comparison.traditional: Admin re-types into Excel. Takes 5-10 minutes per order.
comparison.rigidBody: Agent reads it, creates order, confirms back on WhatsApp. 30 seconds.

comparison.traditional: Warehouse calls HQ. HQ calls vendor. 2-3 day delay.
comparison.rigidBody: Agent detects it, generates PO, sends to vendor. Same hour.

comparison.traditional: You find out 2-4 weeks later from distributor reports.
comparison.rigidBody: Agent detects pattern from WhatsApp orders. Procurement triggered same day.

comparison.traditional: Accounts team finds out at month-end reconciliation.
comparison.rigidBody: Agent holds new orders and flags it immediately.

comparison.traditional: Hire 3-5 more admin staff. Train for 2 months.
comparison.rigidBody: Same agents, new territory. Live in days.

sections.title: Your team already runs on WhatsApp and Excel. Now it runs itself.
sections.description: No migration. No new software to learn. No 6-month implementation. We plug into what you already do — and your operations start running automatically in weeks.

footer.tagline: AI operations for Indian FMCG manufacturers
